description: This file contains multiple React functional components that serve as UI primitives/widgets, including Card components, chart placeholders, tables, and visualizations. It provides these components as parts of a dashboard UI library.

methods.name: Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })
methods.description: Accessible container component that displays a header with optional title, subtitle, role badge, and actions, and contains children elements.

methods.name: DrilldownCard({ title, subtitle, children, roleBadge })
methods.description: A variant of Card that includes an export button to save the referenced content as PNG using an external exporter.

methods.name: Legend({ items })
methods.description: Component that displays a set of colored dots with labels, forming a legend.

methods.name: BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 })
methods.description: Minimal bar chart placeholder that ensures no visual height and no layout shifts. Used as an accessible placeholder.

methods.name: LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" })
methods.description: A simple sparkline representation with bars to mimic a line, based on data.

methods.name: PieChartLike({ parts })
methods.description: Creates a radial pie/donut chart using CSS conic-gradient and displays a legend.

methods.name: Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" })
methods.description: Semicircular gauge component showing a percentage value.

methods.name: SimpleTable({ columns, rows, onRowClick })
methods.description: Responsive, minimal table component optimized for small screens, with flexible cell rendering.

methods.name: HeatmapGrid({ values, xLabels = [], yLabels = [], valueToColor })
methods.description: Simple heatmap visualization mapping values to background colors with labels.

methods.name: NetworkGraph({ nodes, links })
methods.description: A lightweight network graph visualization with nodes and link lines rendered via SVG, with absolute-positioned labels.

ctags.name: BarChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 }) {$/

ctags.name: Card
ctags.pattern: /^export function Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })

ctags.name: DrilldownCard
ctags.pattern: /^export function DrilldownCard({ title, subtitle, children, roleBadge }) {$/

ctags.name: Gauge
ctags.pattern: /^export function Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" }) {$/

ctags.name: HeatmapGrid
ctags.pattern: /^export function HeatmapGrid({ values, xLabels = [], yLabels = [], valueToColor }) {$/

ctags.name: LineChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" }) {$/
